MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Harold Gaines is present.
Attorney James Penrod representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUL-30-2012 is vacated.
